title: Fresh Animations X The Original Work
description: Play with the Original textures of minecraft with a Fresh touch of animations!
body:
For this Pack to work you will need **Fresh Animations made by freshLX here is the link : [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)**  

![TOWFA](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/faf2d5ea06bd0aeca85d42a7ea7eed0f17029a29.png)
Fresh Animations X The Original Work is a resource pack that blends fluid, Trailer like animations with the nostalgic look of old Minecraft. Mobs move more dynamically while the game retains its classic pixelated charm, creating a unique mix of modern motion and retro visuals.
